narrative:
Cols 60-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 936 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
